payload.title: Tier 3 — Novel agent-specific lint targets (eval-gated)
payload.description:
Lints aimed at agent failure modes Clippy doesn't target. HONEST FRAMING: the mechanism here is commodity (a linter can do it) — these do NOT widen the moat. The novelty is the target, not the capability. Only the target selection differentiates from a clippy.toml.

Strictly eval-gated: build a lint here only after a corpus/run shows agents shipping the bug, the same discipline that kept R0001/R0004 honest in the README (those rules were specified but NOT vindicated by the eval).
